text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... I made it. I finally arrived!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm in... Tokyo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, stay on track! This isn't the time for dawdling! Let's see... now
that I'm at the airport, I have to...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me? Could you help me please? I need some directions.

text_block_list.name: Airport Staff
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! Where are you trying to go?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to get to the Japan Umamusume Training Center Academy,
please!
Event title logo display

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy: Japan's best training institution for Umamusume
who aspire to enter the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've always admired the Tracen Academy racers. Ever since I was little,
I've watched them light up the track on TV...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of them was so special! They really sparkled! I
always wanted to be just like them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(So I couldn't believe it when I passed the school entrance exam.
Mom and I had to pinch each other to make sure we weren't
dreaming!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(But this is no dream. No, I'm here to make my dreams come true!
That's why... I have to run!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm here! This is the station closest to the academy! Mom told me to
make sure to ask someone for directions, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Nah! I have a map, after all. I can just use this and I'll be fine! After
all...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: From today on, I'm a student of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...A student with no sense of direction! Dummy, dummy, dummy,
dummyyy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Where in blazes am I?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... The sun's getting low... and I'm hungry too. Am I on a
one-way road to disaster? Mooooom!
Whoosh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that the wind?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Not a chance! That was totally...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Those ears, that tail... They're just like mine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! No way, omigosh! You're actually, like really, actually...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...an Umamusume, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: H-huh? I-I am, but... do you need something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No! I mean, this is just my first time seeing one in person like this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Whoaaa, like... Whoa! This is crazy! She's an Umamusume like me, yet so different! Her tail sparkling in the setting sun is so prettyyy!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ummm...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! S-s-sorry! I didn't mean to stare at you like that! I was just so
amazed with how pretty you are... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that I take a closer look, that red tracksuit of yours... Does
that mean you're a student at Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... And your uniform means... you're one too, no?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I just transferred here today though! I'm Special Week! Nice to
meet you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that right? ...Um, nice to meet you too. I'm Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, huh? I won't forget! Anyway, um... is it okay if I ask you
something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The Academy! Do you know how to get there?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew. Special Week, um... are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze... Wheeew... I-I'm okay! I mean, I'm better than okay!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That was a lot of fun! Like, sooooo much fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've never run together with anyone before, let alone another
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The tippy tap of our footsteps and our tails swishing around
together... Hahaha! It was so great, you know? Like, seriously fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... By the way... we're here. This is Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It's here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Moving...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Moving...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Moving...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's sooo huuuge... Ueeergh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Aah?! Uh... Special Week?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (And so the curtain rises on my new life at Tracen Academy!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hey, Special Week?! Um... Please, w-wake up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (...Though I can't even rise to my feet!)
